# Create Artifact

Create a new primary project artifact or capability from the user request.

## Procedure

understand

- Save the user request to `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/request.md`.
- Inspect project structure and relevant files before choosing a target.
- Read `.wonder/config/build.json` when it exists.
- Read `.wonder/standards/` only as criteria when the governing registry is initialized.
- Read `.wonder/reuse/` only as optional reusable context when the reuse registry is initialized.
- Read `.wonder/extend/capabilities.json` only as optional capability context when the extension registry is initialized.
- Continue without optional context when the core create work can still be done safely.

plan

- Classify the work as create when the main goal is a new primary artifact or capability.
- Choose target files and integration points.
- Record assumptions and skipped optional inputs.
- Ask before decisions that affect product direction, data safety, security, public API, or broad architecture.

implement

- Create the primary artifact.
- Update integration files required by the new artifact.
- Keep unrelated cleanup out of scope.
- Record created and modified paths in `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/artifacts.json`.

inspect

- Discover validation commands in this order: `.wonder/config/build.json` `validationCommands`, package scripts named `test`, `typecheck`, `lint`, `build`, then project-specific commands from local docs or config.
- Run available validation commands.
- Record command, exit code, and relevant output summary in `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/inspect.md`.
- Record the unavailable validation reason when no command can run.
- Do not hide validation failures.

report

- Write `.wonder/runs/<run-id>/report.md`.
- Update `.wonder/reports/build-latest.json`.
- Summarize changed files, validation, assumptions, and risks.

Do not install dependencies without explicit user consent.
Do not write `.wonder/config/govern.json`.
Do not write `.wonder/config/reuse.json`.
Do not write `.wonder/config/extend.json`.
Do not write `.wonder/reports/govern-latest.json`.
Do not automatically install companion tools.
Do not perform unrelated cleanup outside the user request.
